descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average grain diameter

descriptors.name: grain size distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: variance in grain size population
descriptors.rationale: distribution characterized by moments or histogram

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: length to width ratio of grains

representation.notes: ratio greater than or equal to one

descriptors.name: grain boundary area per volume
descriptors.physical_meaning: total boundary area normalized by volume

descriptors.name: texture strength
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of crystallographic preferred orientation
descriptors.rationale: quantified by texture index or ODF

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: proportion of low energy coherent boundaries

descriptors.name: high angle boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction of boundaries exceeding 15 degrees
descriptors.rationale: binary classification threshold at fifteen degrees

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: excess energy at grain interfaces

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: length of dislocations per unit volume

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: population of boundary types by misorientation

representation.notes: discretized fundamental zone of rotation space

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation angle
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic rotation across boundary
descriptors.rationale: angle in axis-angle representation of rotation

descriptors.name: grain orientation spread
descriptors.physical_meaning: intragranular orientation variation

descriptors.name: triple junction density
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of three-grain junctions per volume

descriptors.name: grain topology
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of neighboring grains per grain

descriptors.name: subgrain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average dislocation cell dimension

descriptors.name: stored elastic energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: energy from lattice defects and distortions

descriptors.name: grain boundary mobility
descriptors.physical_meaning: boundary velocity per unit driving force

descriptors.name: grain boundary tortuosity
descriptors.physical_meaning: actual to straight-line boundary length ratio

descriptors.name: grain shape factor
descriptors.physical_meaning: deviation from ideal spherical grain shape
descriptors.rationale: shape descriptor like sphericity or circularity

descriptors.name: recrystallized fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of newly formed grains

descriptors.name: grain boundary segregation
descriptors.physical_meaning: solute enrichment at boundary interfaces

descriptors.name: grain boundary plane orientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic plane of boundary interface

representation.notes: two angles or three normalized indices

descriptors.name: grain boundary connectivity
descriptors.physical_meaning: percolation of specific boundary types
